April 2026 general conference

  • Saturday Morning Session

    • Saturday Morning Session

      The Saturday morning session of the 196th annual general conference of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints held on April 4–5, 2026.

    • Dallin H. Oaks

      Introduction

      President Oaks explains that in a solemn assembly, members of the Church vote to sustain members of the First Presidency and the Quorum of the Twelve Apostles.

    • D. Todd Christofferson

      Solemn Assembly

      In a solemn assembly, President Christofferson presents the names of the First Presidency and Quorum of the Twelve Apostles for sustaining votes.

    • Patrick Kearon

      About His Business

      Elder Kearon teaches that callings from the Lord are tailor-made for our growth and that when we respond to a call, we don’t merely fill an assignment but join the Saviour in His redeeming work.

    • Kristin M. Yee

      Ministering—“That Ye Love One Another; as I Have Loved You”

      Sister Yee describes how Jesus Christ ministered and testifies of the blessings of ministering in His way.

    • Clark G. Gilbert

      Come Home

      Elder Gilbert shares examples of people who found their way back to the gospel of Jesus Christ and teaches that Christ will help all to “come home.”

    • David A. Bednar

      All Who Have Endured Valiantly

      Elder Bednar teaches that enduring valiantly to the end means becoming more like Christ as we practice charity throughout our lives.

    • Michael John U. Teh

      Follow the Prophet; He Knows the Way

      Elder Teh teaches that following the teachings and example of prophets, seers, and revelators can help us come closer to Jesus Christ.

    • Jorge T. Becerra

      Tithing—Putting God First

      Elder Becerra teaches that we can put God first by obeying the law of tithing.

    • Henry B. Eyring

      Prayers for Peace

      President Eyring teaches that turning to Heavenly Father in fervent prayer will bring peace and abiding support.

  • Saturday Afternoon Session

    • Saturday Afternoon Session

      The Saturday afternoon session of the 196th annual general conference of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints held on April 4–5, 2026.

    • D. Todd Christofferson

      Sustaining of General Authorities, Area Seventies, and General Officers

      President Christofferson presents the General Authorities, Area Seventies, and General Officers of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints for a sustaining vote.

    • Jared B. Larson

      Church Auditing Department Report, 2025

      Jared B. Larson shares the Church Auditing Department Report for 2025.

    • Gary E. Stevenson

      Lost Luggage, Redeemed Souls

      Elder Stevenson teaches that we can help each other return safely to God as we serve in ministering assignments and nurture the rising generation.

    • Eduardo F. Ortega

      Christ—Author and Finisher of Our Faith

      Elder Ortega teaches that becoming a lifelong disciple of Jesus Christ is a process of daily personal and spiritual events.

    • Wan-Liang Wu

      “I Will Give Away All My Sins to Know Thee”

      Elder Wu teaches that coming unto Christ is more than just learning of Christ. It includes faith, repentance, and conversion.

    • David J. Wunderli

      Jesus Christ Is Not Our Burden; He Is Our Relief

      Brother Wunderli teaches that Jesus Christ brings relief and eases our burdens.

    • Gérald Caussé

      Love All; Love Each

      Elder Caussé teaches that as disciples of Jesus Christ, we bear witness of Him whenever we share His love with all around us—and help it take root in each person we meet.

    • Brian J. Holmes

      Jesus Christ Is the Way

      Elder Holmes teaches that the only way to eternal life is to have faith in Jesus Christ and follow Him and His servants on the covenant path.

    • Clement M. Matswagothata

      He Knows You by Name

      Elder Matswagothata teaches that the Savior knows us by name and will guide us through every season of life.

    • Ulisses Soares

      Jesus Christ—the True Vine

      Elder Soares explains how Jesus Christ is like a vine that gives us spiritual nourishment as we choose to abide in Him.

  • Sunday Morning Session

    • Sunday Morning Session

      The Sunday morning session of the 196th annual general conference of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints held on April 4–5, 2026.

    • Dieter F. Uchtdorf

      Encounter at the Empty Tomb

      President Uchtdorf teaches about the women who first saw the empty tomb and bore witness of Christ’s Resurrection and invites all of us to have a similar spiritual encounter and testimony.

    • Emily Belle Freeman

      Best Days and Worst Days

      President Freeman testifies that on our best days and on our worst days, we can receive strength as we walk with Christ and hold fast to His eternal truths.

    • Pedro X. Larreal

      I Feel My Savior’s Love

      Elder Larreal teaches that the sacrament is a reminder of the great love Christ has for us.

    • Edward B. Rowe

      Choose Jesus Christ as Your Guide

      Elder Rowe teaches that Jesus Christ can guide us through life’s journey as we listen to His Spirit.

    • Ronald A. Rasband

      He Is Risen

      Elder Rasband shares the accounts of Jesus Christ’s Resurrection in the Bible and Book of Mormon, along with His own witness as an Apostle.

    • Dale G. Renlund

      Because of Jesus Christ

      Elder Renlund teaches that focusing on Jesus Christ and His Atonement will bring joy and clarity to our lives.

    • Thierry K. Mutombo

      The Joy of a Covenant Relationship with God

      Elder Mutombo describes how Heavenly Father extends His love to us through the Atonement of Jesus Christ and our covenants with Him.

    • Alan R. Walker

      A Peculiar Treasure

      Elder Walker teaches that we can be a peculiar treasure to the Lord if we obey His voice and keep His covenant.

    • Dallin H. Oaks

      Alive in Christ

      President Oaks teaches us to avoid contention, to be peacemakers, and to strive to be holy.

  • Sunday Afternoon Session

    • Sunday Afternoon Session

      The Sunday afternoon session of the 196th annual general conference of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints held on April 4–5, 2026.

    • D. Todd Christofferson

      The Character of Christ

      President Christofferson teaches that emulating the character of Christ will help us become who we need to be.

    • Chi Hong (Sam) Wong

      Remember, Remember

      Using five scriptures from the Book of Mormon, Elder Wong shares what God wants us to remember.

    • Aaron T. Hall

      I Glory in My Jesus

      Elder Hall teaches about the mercy, love, and saving power of Jesus Christ.

    • Susan H. Porter

      “Here Am I, Send Me”

      President Porter teaches that, like the boy who shared his loaves and fishes, children can make a difference.

    • Neil L. Andersen

      Eternal Marriage Is an Eternal Journey

      Elder Andersen teaches about the responsibilities and blessings of the marriage covenant.

    • Quentin L. Cook

      Keys, Covenants, and Easter

      Elder Cook teaches that the appearance of the Savior to the Prophet Joseph Smith and the keys committed by Moses, Elias, and Elijah are central to the Restoration of the gospel of Jesus Christ.

    • Taniela B. Wakolo

      Come unto Christ—Together

      Elder Wakolo teaches that as we are faithful and patient in our discipleship, the Lord will fulfill His promises.

    • Gerrit W. Gong

      ’Tis Eastertide: No One Walks Alone

      Elder Gong teaches that as we faithfully keep our covenants, we will come to know Jesus Christ and He will abide with us.

    • Dallin H. Oaks

      Closing Remarks

      President Oaks teaches that as we focus on Jesus Christ and study the teachings from conference, we will receive personal revelation and guidance.
